items.title: Skyhawk Security Strengthens Autonomous Red Team with Agentic AI, Enabling Continuous Security Control Validation
items.author: Chen Burshan
items.description: Skyhawk Security launches AI-powered capabilities for its Red Team platform, enabling continuous security control validation across cloud environments by integrating with various security tools and providing comprehensive threat detection and prevention insights.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mentioned as an integrated QRadar SIEM tool
Mentioned for CloudWatch integration and hosting the conference
Mentioned as an endpoint security control integrated into the platform

items.title: International Business Machines Corp. stock underperforms Tuesday when compared to competitors
items.description: International Business Machines Corp. stock underperforms Tuesday when compared to competitors

items.title: Investors Heavily Search International Business Machines Corporation (IBM): Here is What You Need to Know
items.description: IBM (IBM) has been one of the stocks most watched by Zacks.com users lately. So, it is worth exploring what lies ahead for the stock.
